pwa_install.title: Install Towk as an app
pwa_install.description: Open Towk directly in its own window, like your other apps.
pwa_install.install_failed: The browser could not open its installation dialog. The manual steps are shown below.
pwa_install.confirm_install: Confirm Install or Add when asked.
pwa_install.ios_safari_share: Tap More, then Share. If Share is already in the toolbar, tap it directly.
pwa_install.ios_safari_home: Scroll down and choose Add to Home Screen.
pwa_install.ios_safari_open: Turn on Open as Web App.
pwa_install.ios_chrome_share: Tap Share on the right of Chrome’s address bar.
pwa_install.ios_other_title: Another browser on iPhone or iPad
pwa_install.ios_other_open: Open this address in Safari (recommended) or Chrome.
pwa_install.ios_other_return: Return to Towk and follow the guide for that browser.
pwa_install.android_chromium_title: Chrome, Edge, Opera, or Samsung Internet on Android
pwa_install.android_chromium_menu: Open the browser menu (⋮) next to the address bar.
pwa_install.android_chromium_install: Choose Add to Home screen, then Install.
pwa_install.android_firefox_install: Tap Install, then use Add automatically or place the icon yourself.
pwa_install.android_other_open: Open this address in current Chrome, Edge, Samsung Internet, Opera, or Firefox.
pwa_install.android_other_return: Return to Towk and follow the guide for that browser.
pwa_install.android_troubleshoot: If Chrome still shows only Create shortcut, remove the old Towk shortcut, close every Towk tab, then reopen this page and wait a moment for Chrome to refresh the app.
pwa_install.windows_firefox_button: Click the Web apps button in the address bar. If it is missing, update Firefox to version 143 or later, or use Chrome or Edge.
pwa_install.windows_firefox_pin: Firefox installs Towk and offers to pin it to the taskbar.
pwa_install.macos_safari_share: Click the Share button in Safari’s toolbar.
pwa_install.desktop_chromium_title: Chrome, Edge, or Opera on this computer
pwa_install.desktop_chromium_icon: Click the Install icon at the right of the address bar when it appears.
pwa_install.desktop_chromium_menu: Otherwise open the browser menu and choose Install page as app or Apps → Install Towk.
pwa_install.desktop_firefox_unsupported_title: Firefox cannot install Towk on this system
pwa_install.desktop_firefox_unsupported_description: Firefox on Linux and macOS does not provide an installed-app window. Open this page in Chrome or Edge, or use Safari on Mac.
pwa_install.desktop_firefox_supported_browsers: Chrome and Edge install Towk as an app; Safari also supports it on Mac.
pwa_install.desktop_other_open: Open this address in Chrome or Edge on Windows/Linux, or Safari on Mac.
pwa_install.desktop_other_return: Return to Towk and use the install action in the address bar or browser menu.
pwa_install.reminder_title: Towk works better as an app
pwa_install.reminder_message: Get a dedicated window, direct access, and supported system notifications. It takes less than a minute.

share_target.title: Share to Towk
share_target.no_destination: Sign in to a Towk server and join a conversation before sharing.
share_target.invalid_description: The content was invalid, expired, or could not be stored securely on this device.
share_target.expired: The shared content has expired. Share it to Towk again.

network.offline: You're offline. Towk will keep trying to reconnect.

outbox.pending_message: Encrypted on this device and sent automatically when possible.
outbox.attention_message: Reconnect or retry to complete delivery.
outbox.unsupported_server: This server cannot safely retry the message automatically. Keep it here or discard it.

ui.cached_timeline: Showing this device’s encrypted history while Towk reconnects.

auth_status.origin_message: You can keep reading what is already loaded. Sign in again to send messages and refresh data.
auth_status.remote_message: This server rejected the stored sign-in. Reconnect it to resume live updates and actions.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.message: You do not have permission to access this page.

expiry.label: Expires
expiry.error_future: Expiry must be in the future.
